input.body_text:
LEADERSHIP INSTITUTE
Developing Tomorrow's Leaders

══════════════════════════════════════
WORKSHOP CONFIRMATION
══════════════════════════════════════

Thank you for registering!

Participant: Jennifer Park
Workshop: Leadership Essentials
Order #: LI-2026-3456

──────────────────────────────────────
WORKSHOP DETAILS
──────────────────────────────────────

Date: Saturday, March 7, 2026
Time: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM

Location:
Leadership Institute Training Center
800 Corporate Drive, Suite 500
Chicago, IL 60601

──────────────────────────────────────
WHAT TO BRING
──────────────────────────────────────
• Laptop (optional)
• Business cards for networking
• Comfortable attire

──────────────────────────────────────
SCHEDULE
──────────────────────────────────────
9:00 AM - Welcome & Introductions
9:30 AM - Module 1: Leadership Foundations
11:00 AM - Break
11:15 AM - Module 2: Communication Strategies
12:30 PM - Lunch (provided)
1:30 PM - Module 3: Team Building
3:00 PM - Break
3:15 PM - Module 4: Action Planning
4:00 PM - Wrap-up & Certificates

──────────────────────────────────────

Parking: Free garage parking available
Catering: Lunch and refreshments included

Contact: training@leadershipinstitute.org

We look forward to seeing you!
